source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Fraunces or a sturdy serif for crafted display moments, Geist for precise product UI, Geist Mono for tabular data, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese navigation, forms, search, labels, and status text.
layout: Narrow-waist grid rhythm, ringed clay dividers, compact navigation, dense dashboard/data panels, precise forms and tables, command search, 8px maximum radii, tactile mud texture samples, and crisp black/yellow active states.

prompts.label: Transparent potter wasp motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in image generation on a flat #00ff00 chroma-key background, then local chroma-key removal to transparent RGBA PNG.
prompts.prompt: Use case: photorealistic-natural. Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source. Primary request: Create only an isolated Potter Wasp motif for a design-system catalog, showing a single potter wasp with a handcrafted mud pot nest, no environment, no wall plane, no text. Subject: One accurate potter wasp with a narrow black waist, glossy black body, warm ochre-yellow markings on head/thorax/abdomen, translucent smoky amber wings, slender legs, and a small rounded clay-brown mud pot nest with an opening and hand-built ridges. The nest should feel like natural clay craftwork from a mud wall but remain an isolated object. Natural insect anatomy, crisp silhouette, tactile mud texture, clay brown, black, yellow, and a tiny muted leaf-green accent only if needed as reflected color. Composition/framing: Centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full wasp and full mud pot nest without cropping. The wasp may be perched on or hovering beside the nest, with both elements clearly readable as one motif. Lighting/mood: Clean studio lighting that preserves natural color and material detail, no cast shadow. Transparent workflow: Place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject. Constraints: no landscape, no mud wall background, no flowers, no honeycomb, no extra insects, no cartoon style, no toy look, no text, no watermark, no signature.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board. Input image role: The visible transparent Potter Wasp motif with a clay mud pot nest is the source reference for palette, material texture, component shapes, contrast, and interaction language. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Potter Wasp", derived from the visible potter wasp and handcrafted mud pot nest cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide if the tool constrains output; use large readable labels, balanced whitespace, and avoid dense tiny token tables. Required visible sections: Morphous Potter Wasp, Potter Wasp, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Reference use: Extract palette and interaction language from clay-brown mud nest ridges, glossy black wasp body, ochre-yellow bands, smoky amber wings, charcoal shadow, warm paper neutrals, and a restrained leaf-green support accent. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, and simple product icons. Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese typography guidance with short examples such as 日本語ナビ, 状態, 検索, 設定. Use clean sans UI, sturdy display headings, tabular mono, and Noto Sans JP style guidance. Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style crafted form system, precise grid, 8px maximum radius, tactile clay surfaces, ringed mud-nest section dividers, narrow-waist layout rhythm, black/yellow active states, amber-wing translucency, leaf accent for support states, and handmade texture samples without looking rustic. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no one-note beige page, no dark-only composition. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Potter Wasp" or "Potter Wasp", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt: Use case: ui-mockup. Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board. Input image roles: The visible transparent Potter Wasp motif is the source motif reference, and the visible light-mode board is the layout and component-language reference. Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Potter Wasp". It must feel like the same visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible potter wasp and clay mud pot nest cutout. Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board. Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide if the tool constrains output; use large readable labels, balanced spacing, and avoid dense tiny token tables. Required visible sections: Morphous Potter Wasp, Potter Wasp, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows. Visual details: dark background derived from glossy wasp black and mud-wall charcoal; foreground from warm paper clay and pale wing highlights; primary actions from ochre-yellow bands; secondary surfaces from deep clay brown; accents from amber translucent wings and muted leaf green; borders from stone dust and clay ridges; subtle handmade mud-nest ring texture overlays; crisp shadcn-style cards and controls. UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, charts, forms, tables, empty/loading/error states, status states, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, and shadows. Typography: include English product UI guidance and Japanese typography guidance with short examples such as 日本語ナビ, 状態, 検索, 設定. Use clean sans UI, sturdy display headings, tabular mono, and Noto Sans JP style guidance. Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style crafted form system, exact same system language as the light board, 8px maximum radius, narrow-waist grid rhythm, tactile clay textures, black/yellow active states, amber-wing highlight strokes, and quiet green support states. Color constraints: use only motif-derived colors and near-neutrals; no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background. Text constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Potter Wasp" or "Potter Wasp", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
